title: Lucky Rabbit Lootbox
description: Light and powerful lootbox plugin with cs like spinning animations
body:
# 🐰 LuckyRabbit – Advanced Lootbox System


**LuckyRabbit** is the ultimate Minecraft lootbox plugin designed to enhance player engagement through captivating animations, comprehensive reward systems, and effortless customization. Built with server administrators and players in mind, LuckyRabbit ensures a fair, exciting, and highly configurable lootbox experience.


## ✨ Key Features​

### 🎲 Engaging Lootbox Animations
- Horizontal (Default): Smooth sliding animation available for all.
- Premium Animations: Circle, Three-In-Row, and Pin-Point animations available exclusively through our Patreon.
- (Additional premium animations coming soon!)

### 🎆 Dynamic Particle Effects
- Fully customizable particle trails and visual effects.
- Vibrant and dynamic visuals enhancing lootbox openings.

### Stunning Particle Effects
- Custom particle trails
- Dynamic animations
- Fully configurable effects

### 📌 Flexible Placement
- Place lootboxes freely anywhere in your Minecraft world.
- Persistent lootbox locations across server restarts.
- Built-in anti-grief protection.

### 🎲 Provably Fair Rewards
- Transparent item drop rates displayed clearly on hover.
- Advanced server-side algorithms to ensure fair and accurate outcomes.

## 🛠️ Extensive Customization Options

### 🎨 Rich Text & Visual Customization
- MiniMessage format support for advanced formatting.
- Beautiful gradients, RGB colors, and interactive hover lore.

### 🔧 Custom Models & Items
- Complete integration with Oraxen.
- Effortless custom item support and implementation.

### ⚙️ Easy Configuration
- User-friendly YAML configuration files.
- Clear, detailed documentation provided.
- Pre-made example configurations for quick setup.

## 🎁 Comprehensive Reward System

### 📦 Diverse Reward Types
- Standard Minecraft items.
- Custom items via Oraxen integration.
- Economy rewards through Vault.
- Command-based rewards.
- Permission-based rewards.
- Multi-reward lootbox support.

### 📊 Advanced Reward Customization
- Percentage-based probabilities.
- Customizable rarity tiers.
- Fully configurable reward quantities and ranges.

## 📜 Commands & Permissions

### 📝 Basic Commands
- `/lb` – Main plugin command overview.
- `/lb list` – Display all available lootboxes.
- `/lb help` – Detailed help on commands.

###  Admin Commands
- `/lb create <name> [animation]` – Create new lootbox.
- `/lb delete <id>` – Delete an existing lootbox.
- `/lb entity spawn/despawn` – Spawn or remove lootbox entities.
- `/lb item add/remove <id>` – Manage lootbox items.
- `/lb key add/remove <player> <id> <amount>` – Manage lootbox keys.
- `/lb reload` – Reload plugin configuration.

### 🔑 Permissions
- luckyrabbit.use – Basic plugin usage.
- luckyrabbit.admin – Full administrative access.
- Admin sub-permissions available (create, delete, item management, key management, entity management).

## 🚀 Installation & Quick Setup

### 📥 Installation Steps
1. Download the LuckyRabbit.jar file.
1. Place it into your server’s plugins folder.
1. Restart your server to auto-generate configurations.

### ⚡ Quick Configuration
1. Create your first lootbox with `/lb create`.
1. Configure rewards and animations.
1. Spawn lootboxes in your world using `/lb entity spawn`.
1. Test and enjoy!

## ⭐ Why Choose LuckyRabbit?​

- **User-Friendly** – Easy installation and intuitive commands.
- **Comprehensive** – A complete solution in one powerful plugin.
- **Optimized** – Minimal impact on server performance.
- **Highly Customizable** – Tailor to perfectly suit your server’s needs.
- **Secure & Transparen**t – Built-in protection ensuring fair gameplay.
- **Documented & Supported** – Comprehensive guides and active developer support.


## Useful Links​

- [Discord Support](https://discord.gg/RfBydgJpmU)
- [Wiki Documentation](https://rabbit-tale-studio.gitbook.io/rabbit-tale-plugins)
- [Configuration Guide](https://rabbit-tale-studio.gitbook.io/rabbit-tale-plugins/plugin-wiki/quickstart/configuration)


Join our Discord community to:
- Receive early access to plugin updates (including beta releases).
- Get technical assistance directly from the developers.
- Submit bug reports and suggest new features.
- Connect and share experiences with other server administrators.


Made with ❤️ by Hasiradoo & Squareshox - RabbitTale Studio .co​
